sections.paragraph:
ἄγκιστρον, ου, τό (Hom. et al.; LXX, e.g. Is 19:8) fishhook

ⓐ lit. βάλλειν ἄ. εἰς θάλασσαν Mt 17:27.

ⓑ fig. (Polyaenus, Exc. 1 p. 431, 10 χρυσοῖς ἀγκίστροις [to fish] w. golden fishhooks) ἐμπεσεῖν εἰς τὰ ἄ. τῆς κενοδοξίας be caught on the fishhooks of error IMg 11.—B. 897; 899. DELG s.v. ἀγκ-.

Hom Hom , VIII b.c.—List 5

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

LXX LXX = Septuaginta, ed. ARahlfs, unless otherwise specified—Lists 2, beg.

e.g. e.g. = exempli gratia (for example)

lit. lit. = literal(ly); literature (refererences to [scholarly] literature)

IMg IMg = Ignatius to the Magnesians—List 1

  1. B. = CDBuck, A Dictionary of Selected Synonyms—List 6

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 12
